label: About
title: About Video Alley Section
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 102 recent saved-signal files and 78 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @john_my07: Seedance 2.0 on OpenArt AI Prompt: Main subject: young Korean woman, early 20s,... and @rileybrown: Prompt and Credits, plus 7 more. A source image from pbs.twimg.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Video Alley Section: A public-scale video alley archive rendered as an architectural section, camera plate grammar visible in horizontal roof bands, concrete ledges, and one tall central cutaway chamber. Muted charcoal, washed denim blue, pale concrete, archive cream, leaf green shade, tiny red-orange glints. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central green-gold luminous vertical chamber, top pale-blue horizontal ledge under roof ribs, and left lower glowing monitor aperture.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
